title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Mahendra's Institute

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Mahendra's Institute
jsonLd.description:
Mahendra's Institute invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mahendra's Institute:
Mahendra's Institute is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahendra's Institute!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
